name: GT-jb-submult
source: HOS, refs/hos/joa-m.md:2306-2312 (3.1.3, Jordan Banach algebra), VERBATIM: "A Jordan Banach algebra is a real Jordan algebra A equipped with a complete norm satisfying  $$||a \circ b|| \leq ||a|| \, ||b||, \qquad a, b \in A.$$" Applied to V=B(H)_sa (a unital JB algebra, GT-bhsa-jc): ||a o b|| <= ||a|| ||b|| for the Jordan product a o b=(ab+ba)/2.
